sentences.arabic: الْحَمَّامُ الْعَرَبِيُّ مَكَانٌ لِلِاسْتِحْمَامِ وَالرَّاحَةِ فِي الْمَدِينَةِ الْقَدِيمَةِ.
sentences.translation: Hammam je mjesto za kupanje i odmor u starom gradu.
sentences.translationEn: The hammam is a place for bathing and relaxation in the old city.

sentences.arabic: يَذْهَبُ النَّاسُ إِلَيْهِ لِيَغْسِلُوا أَجْسَادَهُمْ وَيَسْتَرِيحُوا مِنْ عَنَاءِ الْيَوْمِ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi odlaze tamo da operu tijela i odmore se od napornog dana.
sentences.translationEn: People go there to wash and unwind after a tiring day.

sentences.arabic: تَتَمَيَّزُ قَاعَاتُ الْحَمَّامِ بِقِبَابِهَا الصَّغِيرَةِ الَّتِي تُدْخِلُ الضَّوْءَ وَالْهَوَاءَ.
sentences.translation: Dvorane hammama prepoznatljive su po malim kupolama koje propuštaju svjetlost i zrak.
sentences.translationEn: The hammam's halls are distinguished by their small domes that let in light and air.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الْحَمَّامُ أَيْضًا مَكَانًا لِلِقَاءِ الْأَصْدِقَاءِ وَتَبَادُلِ الْأَخْبَارِ.
sentences.translation: Hammam je bio i mjesto gdje su se prijatelji susretali i razmjenjivali vijesti.
sentences.translationEn: The hammam was also a place where friends met and exchanged news.
